options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: Select the instance library from the specified delay corner.

options.name: -file
options.description: Name of the output file. If no file is specified the report will be printed on stdout.

options.name: -instance
options.description: The instance(s) for which the report is to be printed. If no instance is provided the report will print the information for all the instances. The value of instance can be a list of regular expressions.

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: The power domain from which instances are to be selected.

options.name: -view
options.description: Select the instance library from the specified view.
